cards.name: Alexander III of Macedon

abilities.name: Kalutera einai na kaeis para na argosviseis
abilities.text: If you do not win initiative, take 1 damage. You always take the first turn each round.

cards.flavor: Alexander has been wounded in battle several times, but that never prevents him from leading his troops from the front.
cards.raw_source_text: Kalutera einai na kaeis para na argosviseis: If you do not win initiative, take 1 damage. You always take the first turn each round.

cards.name: Leonidas I of Sparta

abilities.name: Romaleos
abilities.text: Once per round, one of your attack or defense rolls gains a bonus equal to the number of opposing warriors.

abilities.name: Improving Odds
abilities.text: When an opposing warrior is defeated, gain 2 life.

cards.flavor: Leonida commands his troops at the Termopili against Serse, though he knows they will be killed.
cards.raw_source_text:
Romaleos: Once per round, one of your attack or defense rolls gains a bonus equal to the number of opposing warriors.
Improving Odds: When an opposing warrior is defeated, gain 2 life.

cards.name: Bushido

abilities.name: Soujoukouka
abilities.text: If all your face-up cards are Japanese, all of your rolls gain +1.

cards.flavor: The Seven principles of Bushido are Yuki (value), Jin (goodness), Gi (reptitude), Rei (good manners), Makoto (Honesty), Chugi (loyalty) and Meiyo (honor).
cards.raw_source_text: Soujoukouka: If all your face-up cards are Japanese, all of your rolls gain +1.

cards.name: Nobunaga

abilities.name: Houtan
abilities.text: Every time a "reveal" ability is used, you gain 1 life.

cards.flavor: Nobunaga never cease to surprise his enemies with new and daring tecniques.
cards.raw_source_text: Houtan: Every time a "reveal" ability is used, you gain 1 life.

cards.name: Shinmen Takezo

abilities.name: Kyougou
abilities.text: Your attack rolls gain +2. Your attacks with swords deal +1 damage.

cards.flavor: Towards the end of his life, Miyamoto Mushashi retires to a cave to perfect his understandings of strategy and to scribe the Gorin No Sho.
cards.raw_source_text: Kyougou: Your attack rolls gain +2. Your attacks with swords deal +1 damage.

cards.name: Canute I of Denmark

abilities.name: Ydmyk
abilities.text: Once per game, at the beginning of a round, substitute all the bonus of all the attack grids with "+0" for that round.

cards.flavor: Danish King Canute, humble and sage, shows the limit of his power ordering to the sea to retreat.
cards.raw_source_text: Ydmyk: Once per game, at the beginning of a round, substitute all the bonus of all the attack grids with "+0" for that round.

cards.name: Geat King Beowulf

abilities.name: Erfaren
abilities.text: Each round, if you win initiative, your attack rolls gain +1 for that round. If you do not win initiative, your defense rolls gain +1 for that round.

cards.flavor: After mortally wounding the Grendel, Beowulf goes after the creature's mother as well.
cards.raw_source_text: Erfaren: Each round, if you win initiative, your attack rolls gain +1 for that round. If you do not win initiative, your defense rolls gain +1 for that round.

cards.name: Gaius Julius

abilities.name: Veni, Vidi, Vici
abilities.text: Once per turn, when you hit a warrior with a basic attack, turn that warrior in any direction.

cards.flavor: Sent from the Senate to conquer Gallia, Gaius Iulius will come back to Rome to declare himself emperor.
cards.raw_source_text: Veni, Vidi, Vici: Once per turn, when you hit a warrior with a basic attack, turn that warrior in any direction.

cards.name: Mars

abilities.name: Concors
abilities.text: If all of your face-up cards are Roman, all of your rolls gain +1.

cards.flavor: War God and father of Romulus ad Remus, Mars one of the most revered and worshipped gods in the Roman Pantheon.
cards.raw_source_text: Concors: If all of your face-up cards are Roman, all of your rolls gain +1.

cards.name: Spartacus of Thrace

abilities.name: Rebellis
abilities.text: Your critical hits deal +2 damage instead of doubling base damage.

cards.flavor: Before he ever leads a slave revolt against Rome, Spartacus is one of the most feared gladiators in the coliseum.
cards.raw_source_text: Rebellis: Your critical hits deal +2 damage instead of doubling base damage.

cards.name: Hattori Hanzo

abilities.name: Kagekakushi
abilities.text: Once per round, before you make an attack with one-handed weapon, move to the space directly behind an opposing warrior, if possible. If you do, the attack roll gains +1 and the attack deals +1 damage.

cards.flavor: Born of the Matsudaira clan, he served Tokugawa Ieyasu loyally and usefully and earned the nickname Devil Hanzo in homage to his great skill with the katana.
cards.raw_source_text: Kagekakushi: Once per round, before you make an attack with one-handed weapon, move to the space directly behind an opposing warrior, if possible. If you do, the attack roll gains +1 and the attack deals +1 damage.

cards.name: Herakles of Thebes

abilities.name: Ellenike
abilities.text: When you make a basic attack, if you have no item in play, roll 3 dice and use the sum of all 3. If the 3 dice roll the same number, the attack deals triple damage. The attack cannot be a critical hit.

cards.flavor: King Eurystheus snet Herakles to capture a white bull that was terrorizing Crete, after King Minos had offended Poseidon, who cursed the bull with madness.
cards.raw_source_text: Ellenike: When you make a basic attack, if you have no item in play, roll 3 dice and use the sum of all 3.  If the 3 dice roll the same number, the attack deals triple damage.  The attack cannot be a critical hit.

cards.name: Naegling

abilities.name: Feigr
abilities.text: After each hit with this weapon, lower its base damage by 1 for the rest of the game, to a minimum of 1.

cards.flavor: Too strong even for the forged steel of his own weapons, Beowulf is said to have shattered his trusty sword Naegling on the head of a great dragon.
cards.raw_source_text: Feigr: After each hit with this weapon, lower its base damage by 1 for the rest of the game, to a minimum of 1.

cards.name: Clotho

abilities.name: Neoterikos
abilities.text: At the start of each round, if you have revealed a Fate, gain +1 speed for this round.

cards.flavor: "And Night bare hateful Doom and black Fate and Death, and she bare Sleep and the tribe of Dreams. And again the goddess murky Night, though she lay with none, bare Blame and painful Woe, and the Hesperides who guard the rich, golden apples and the trees bearing fruit beyond glorious Ocean." - Hesiod, Theogony
cards.raw_source_text: Neoterikos: At the start of each round, if you have revealed a Fate, gain +1 speed for this round.

cards.name: Lachesis

abilities.name: Horizo
abilities.text: You may have up to three Fate inspirations in play.

abilities.name: Krino
abilities.text: Your attack rolls gain +1 for each Fate you have in play.

cards.flavor: "Also she bare the Destinies and the ruthless avenging Fates, Clotho and Lachesis and Atropos, who give men at their birth both evil and good to have, and they pursue the transgressions of men and of gods; and these goddesses never cease from their dread anger until they punish the sinner with a sore penalty." - Hesiod, Theogony
cards.raw_source_text:
Horizo: You may have up to three Fate inspirations in play.
Krino: Your attack rolls gain +1 for each Fate you have in play.

cards.name: Atropos

abilities.name: Diaphthora
abilities.text: Reveal - If you have three Fates in play, deal 3 damage to an opponent. This ability cannot reduce a warrior to below 1 life.

cards.flavor: "Next Zeus married bright Themis who bare the Horae, and Eunomia, Dike, and blooming Eirene, who mind the works of mortal men, and the Moarae to whom wise Zeus gave the greatest honor, Clotho, and Lachesis, and Atropos who give mortal men evil and good to have." - Hesiod, Theogony
cards.raw_source_text: Diaphthora: Reveal - If you have three Fates in play, deal 3 damage to an opponent. This ability cannot reduce a warrior to below 1 life.

cards.name: Seth

abilities.name: Isft
abilities.text: Each player reveals their support cards in reverse order ( from right to left).

cards.flavor: God of chaos, he is the embodiment of hostility and even of outright evil. He is also a god of war, deserts, storms, and foreign lands.
cards.raw_source_text: Isft: Each player reveals their support cards in reverse order ( from right to left).

cards.name: Stone of Destiny

abilities.name: This card also counts as a Scottish card. Coronacioun
abilities.text: Before you make a roll, if you do not have a Fire card, pick a number no greater than your experience. You permanently lose that much experience and add that amount to this roll.

cards.flavor: According to legend, the Stone of Destiny came from the Holy Land, where Jacob supposedly used it as a pillow in Biblical times.  After traveling through Egypt, Sicily, Spain, and Ireland, it found its home in Scone and with the Dalriadic monarchs.
cards.raw_source_text: This card also counts as a Scottish card. Coronacioun: Before you make a roll, if you do not have a Fire card, pick a number no greater than your experience. You permanently lose that much experience and add that amount to this roll.

cards.name: Chan Zhang

abilities.name: Feng Mo Zhang Fa
abilities.text: Twice each turn, after and attack misses you, you may immediately make an attack against the attacker if possible.

cards.flavor: The monk cudgel made famous by Lu Zhi Shen, the tattooed monk, is used to disarm opponents or break their weapons while raining blows upon all parts of their body.
cards.raw_source_text: Feng Mo Zhang Fa: Twice each turn, after and attack misses you, you may immediately make an attack against the attacker if possible.

cards.name: Batu Khan

abilities.name: Altan Ordon Ulus
abilities.text: Once per round, after you make a critical hit, you may immediately make another attack of the same type against the same opponent.

cards.flavor: Leading the Blue Horde of the Mongol Empire, Batu Khan conquered westward as far as Germany before being recalled to Karakorum to participate in the election of the grand khan. Many believe that this was all that prevented the Monguls from extending their empire to the Atlantic coast of Europe.
cards.raw_source_text: Altan Ordon Ulus: Once per round, after you make a critical hit, you may immediately make another attack of the same type against the same opponent.

cards.name: A'Phiob Mhor

abilities.name: Dualchas Priseil
abilities.text: At the end of each opponent's turn, if they are in the same space they were at the start of their turn, deal 1 damage to that warrior.

cards.flavor: Believed to orgininate in Sumaria, Celtic migrations introduced the bagpipes throughout Europe. Only in Scotland, however, have they become an integral part of the cultural identity of the people.
cards.raw_source_text: Dualchas Priseil: At the end of each opponent's turn, if they are in the same space they were at the start of their turn, deal 1 damage to that warrior.

cards.name: D'Artagnan

abilities.name: Riposte
abilities.text: Once each turn, after you make an attack or defense roll, if the attack misses, you may move one space. Your next attack roll with a French sword gains +1.

cards.flavor: Although immortalized in Dumas' novel The Three Musketeers, the real D'Artagnan was a musketeer proper, and rose to the position of Commander of the King's Grand Musketeers, the most coveted military appointment in France.
cards.raw_source_text: Riposte: Once each turn, after you make an attack or defense roll, if the attack misses, you may move one space. Your next attack roll with a French sword gains +1.

cards.name: Allt A'Bhonnaich

abilities.name: Dilse
abilities.text: Opposing cards cannot prevent you from using abilities on your support cards.

abilities.name: Cabhag
abilities.text: At the start of each round, if you have two or more support cards that match your warrior's element and/or culture, gain +1 speed for that round.

cards.flavor: Lay the proud Usurpers low! Tyrants fall in every foe! LIBERTY'S in every blow! - Let us Do or Die! - Robert Burns, Robert Bruce's March to Bannockburn
cards.raw_source_text:
Dilse: Opposing cards cannot prevent you from using abilities on your support cards.
Cabhag: At the start of each round, if you have two or more support cards that match your warrior's element and/or culture, gain +1 speed for that round.

cards.name: Šspw

abilities.name: Tst
abilities.text: Before you make an attack roll, choose "odd" or "even". If your attack roll matches your choice and the defense roll does not, this and your next attack roll deal +1 damage. You cannot use this ability again this round.

cards.flavor: One of ancient Egypt's most mysterious artifacts, the most popular current theory holds that the Sphinx was built by the fourth-dynasty king, Khafre (2558-2532 BC).
cards.raw_source_text: Tst: Before you make an attack roll, choose "odd" or "even". If your attack roll matches your choice and the defense roll does not, this and your next attack roll deal +1 damage. You cannot use this ability again this round.

cards.name: Donar-Eiche

abilities.name: Standfestigkeit
abilities.text: At the start of each round, if you won initiative, your first attack roll that round gains +2 if the defender has more experience than your warrior. If you lost initiative, you may move one space.

cards.flavor: Saint Boniface had Thor's Oak felled to prove the superiority of teh Christian god. When Thor did not strike him down, the assembled locals agreed to be baptized.
cards.raw_source_text: Standfestigkeit: At the start of each round, if you won initiative, your first attack roll that round gains +2 if the defender has more experience than your warrior. If you lost initiative, you may move one space.

cards.name: Rapiere

abilities.name: Botte
abilities.text: Once each round, after you move outside of your turn, you may make an attack with this weapon, if possible. This attack deals +1 damage.

cards.flavor: Appearing in the early Renaissance, the rapier was actually quite a cumbersome weapon, suited far more to attack than defense. Over time, it evolved into a lighter, faster weapon.
cards.raw_source_text: Botte: Once each round, after you move outside of your turn, you may make an attack with this weapon, if possible. This attack deals +1 damage.

cards.name: San Jie Gun

abilities.name: Shou
abilities.text: Once each round; if your attack roll with this weapon is greater than the defense roll plus three, you may immediately make another attack with this weapon, if possible.

cards.flavor: Devised from a simple farm implement, the san jie gun (three-section staff) requires exceptional skill to use, but is truly devastating in the hands of a master.
cards.raw_source_text: Shou: Once each round; if your attack roll with this weapon is greater than the defense roll plus three, you may immediately make another attack with this weapon, if possible.

cards.name: Volkerwanderung

abilities.name: Aufbruch ~ Reveal
abilities.text: Place this card in any unoccupied space in the arena.

abilities.name: Ziel der Hoffnung
abilities.text: Opposing warrior's defense rolls get -1. Warriors cannot gain life. When any warrior moves into this card's space, discard this card.

cards.flavor: The westward migration of Germanic tribes from Indo-Europe strained the Roman Empire beyond breaking point and set in motion its final collapse.
cards.raw_source_text:
Aufbruch ~ Reveal: Place this card in any unoccupied space in the arena.
Ziel der Hoffnung: Opposing warrior's defense rolls get -1.
Warriors cannot gain life. When any warrior moves into this card's space, discard this card.

cards.name: Wakinyan

abilities.name: Kap'os'ic'iya
abilities.text: At the start of each round, if you used actions to move and to attack on your previous turn, all of your rolls that round gain +1, and the next support card you reveal gains +5 initiative.

cards.flavor: When he opens and shuts his eyes, he makes lightening. When he flaps his wings, he makes thunder and the great winds.
cards.raw_source_text: Kap'os'ic'iya: At the start of each round, if you used actions to move and to attack on your previous turn, all of your rolls that round gain +1, and the next support card you reveal gains +5 initiative.

cards.name: Tĥahé Hahúwanap'iŋ

abilities.name: Wanáği Čhiyéyapi Nakíčižiŋpi
abilities.text: Opposing warriors' weapon attacks cannot deal more damage than the highest base damage among your weapons, minimum one.

cards.flavor: For the Native Americans of the Northern and Southern Plains, the possession of a breastplate represented prosperity and standing. As such, it was often worn during traditional ceremonies and social dances.
cards.raw_source_text: Wanáği Čhiyéyapi Nakíčižiŋpi: Opposing warriors' weapon attacks cannot deal more damage than the highest base damage among your weapons, minimum one.

cards.name: Si An Bhru

abilities.name: Eiric
abilities.text: After any other card is discarded, you may discard this card. If you do, your next attack roll is considered doubles.

abilities.name: Oidhreacht
abilities.text: Once each match, at the start of a game, if this card is in your discard pile, your warrior gains +2 experience.

cards.flavor: Built in about 3200 BC, this megalithic tomb only admits the light of the sun to its furthest depths at the dawn of each winter solstice.
cards.raw_source_text:
Eiric: After any other card is discarded, you may discard this card. If you do, your next attack roll is considered doubles.
Oidhreacht: Once each match, at the start of a game, if this card is in your discard pile, your warrior gains +2 experience.

cards.name: Clairseach Bhoru

abilities.name: Comhcheol
abilities.text: If all of your face-up cards are Irish, your rolls gain +1.

cards.flavor: Although this harp was crafted in the fifteenth century, long after Boru died, the association between the two has been reinforced by hundreds of years of tradition. It is the national symbol of Ireland.
cards.raw_source_text: Comhcheol: If all of your face-up cards are Irish, your rolls gain +1.

cards.name: Hawaiki

abilities.name: Iwi Whanui
abilities.text: If all of your face-up cards are Maori, your rolls gain +1.

cards.flavor: Hawaiki is the mythical island from which the Maori trace their origins. Polynesian peoples beleive that their souls return there upon death.
cards.raw_source_text: Iwi Whanui: If all of your face-up cards are Maori, your rolls gain +1.

cards.name: Pou Whenua

abilities.name: Tukituki
abilities.text: Twice each round, if you have not missed with this weapon this round, make an attack with it if possible.

cards.flavor: Frequently carved from whalebone, the pou whenua is used to mercilessly bludgeon an opponent.
cards.raw_source_text: Tukituki - Action: Twice each round, if you have not missed with this weapon  this round, make an attack with it if possible.

cards.name: Ostovany Khourosh

abilities.name: Dod
abilities.text: Opponents' weapon attacks use their basic attack grid instead of the weapon's attack grid.

cards.flavor: Now a museum, having been a Greek Orthodox Church and a Mosque, when Emporer Justinian I completed it, he is said to have uttered, "Solomon, I have surpassed thee!"
cards.raw_source_text: Dod: Opponents' weapon attacks  use their basic attack grid instead of the weapon's attack grid.

cards.name: Sagaris

abilities.name: Shiveshodan
abilities.text: When you attack with this weapon, if you have less experience than the defender, the attack roll gains +2 and the attack deals +1 damage.

cards.flavor: Scythian in origin, the sagaris nonetheless became a very popular weapon among Persion armies.
cards.raw_source_text: Shiveshodan: When you attack with this weapon, if you have less experience than the defender, the attack roll gains +2 and the attack deals +1 damage.

cards.name: Rasputin

abilities.name: Ne'ukrotimiy
abilities.text: Before you take damage, if you are an Earth warrior and the damage would reduce your life below 1, you may discard one of your other face-up support cards to reduce the damage to 0.

cards.flavor: Though he exerted tremendous personal power over the Tsar and Tsarina, Rasputin's reputations for debauchery led to his assassination by members of the royal family.  He was poisoned, shot three times, and finally drowned.
cards.raw_source_text: Ne'ukrotimiy: Before you take damage, if you are an Earth warrior and the damage would reduce your life below 1, you may discard one of your other face-up support cards to reduce the damage to 0.

cards.name: Baba Yaga

abilities.name: Skrytaya
abilities.text: Opponents cannot attack you with weapons more than once each round. If any opponent has more than one weapon in play, you may attack with one of your weapons twice each round.

cards.flavor: Baba Yaga is a cannibalistic witch. She is often called "bone legs", as she is very skinny. She rides in a huge mortar, using the pestle to steer, and is often referred to as "the devil's own grandmother".
cards.raw_source_text: Skrytaya: Opponents cannot attack you with weapons more than once each round. If any opponent has more than one weapon in play, you may attack with one of your weapons twice each round.

cards.name: Godfrey of Bouillon

abilities.name: Retournement
abilities.text: Each round initiative is resolved from lowest to highest.

cards.flavor: A leader of the first crusade, Godfrey was among the first to enter Jerusalem, amid the general slaughter of Muslims and Jews. He refused to be crowned King of Jerusalem, instead taking the title Advocatus Sancti Sepulchri, Advocate of the Holy Sepulcher
cards.raw_source_text: Retournement: Each round initiative is resolved from lowest to highest.

cards.name: Gaiseric

abilities.name: Bewaffnet
abilities.text: If you ever have a weapon card in play, discard it immediately.

abilities.name: Angriff
abilities.text: Once each round, make an attack against an adjacent opponent. This attack counts as an attack with a weapon and has a base damage of 2. The attack roll gains +2.

cards.flavor: A brilliant military leader, Gaiseric captured Hippo Regius and Carthage.  Later, taking advantage of political unrest, he attacked and sacked Rome itself.
cards.raw_source_text:
Bewaffnet: If you ever have a weapon card in play, discard it immediately.
Angriff - Action: Once each round, make an attack against an adjacent opponent.  This attack counts as an attack with a weapon and has a base damage of 2.  The attack roll gains +2.

cards.name: Liu Bei

abilities.name: Zhua zhuang ding
abilities.text: At the start of each roound you may get -2 experience to choose another player's card ability that gives an attack roll, damage, or speed bonus. That ability has no effect for that round.

cards.flavor: Born a shoemaker, Liu Bei rose to become a great warlord and, ultimately, the first Emporer of the Kingdom of Shu.
cards.raw_source_text: Zhua zhuang ding: At the start of each roound you may get -2 experience to choose another player's card ability that gives an attack roll, damage, or speed bonus. That ability has no effect for that round.

cards.name: Saif

abilities.name: Yendafae Besarah
abilities.text: When you attack with this weapon, if the defense roll is less than this card's initiative, the attack deals +1 damage.

abilities.name: Dokha
abilities.text: If you revealed a ranged weapon this game, your attack rolls gain +1.

cards.flavor: Generally very similar to the Persian shamshir,some Arabian saif more closely resembled Turkish kilij swords.
cards.raw_source_text:
Yendafae Besarah: When you attack with this weapon, if the defense roll is less than this card's initiative, the attack deals +1 damage.
Dokha: If you revealed a ranged weapon this game, your attack rolls gain +1.

cards.name: Jihad

abilities.name: Radabilej
abilities.text: If all of your cards are Saracen, your rolls gain +1.

cards.flavor: The word "jihad" derives from the Arabic root "jhd," meaning, "to strive to the utmost".  In the sufi tradition, Jihad al-Akbar is the greater jihad, and is the spiritual struggle against one's inner self (nafs) and desires (hawa).  Jihad al-Asgar is the lesser jihad.  It is external and refers to physical effort, including war.
cards.raw_source_text: Radabilej: If all of your cards are Saracen, your rolls gain +1.

cards.name: Cuauhxicalli

abilities.name: Motemachia
abilities.text: Whenever you reveal a card (including this one), put a counter on this card. At the start of each round, you may remove a counter from this card. If you do, your rolls for that round gain +1 for each counter on this card.

cards.flavor: This stone calendar, carved during the riegn of Axayacatl, weighs almost 25 tons and has a diameter of just less than 12 feet.
cards.raw_source_text: Motemachia: Whenever you reveal a card (including this one), put a counter on this card. At the start of each round, you may remove a counter from this card. If you do, your rolls for that round gain +1 for each counter on this card.

cards.name: Templo Mayor

abilities.name: Tlamanalli
abilities.text: At the end of any round, you may discard one of your support cards. If you do, you may attack with one of your weapons twice on your next turn.

cards.flavor: The main temple of the city of Tenochtitlán, the Templo Mayor rose to a height of over 60 meters and bore shrines dedicated to Huitzilopochtli and Tlaloc.
cards.raw_source_text: Tlamanalli: At the end of any round, you may discard one of your support cards. If you do, you may attack with one of your weapons twice on your next turn.

cards.name: Reconquista

abilities.name: Patiotismo
abilities.text: If all your cards are Spainish, your rolls gain +1.

cards.flavor: From 718 to 1492, Christian rulers waged the Reconquista to drive the Saracens from the Iberian Penninsula, following Tariq ibn Ziyad's conquest of the Visigoths.
cards.raw_source_text: Patiotismo: If all your cards are Spainish, your rolls gain +1.

cards.name: Tomas de Torquemada

abilities.name: Oprimir
abilities.text: When an opponent reveals a deity, tome, or mystic support card, they may chose to discard it and set their initiative for that round to 0. If they do not, deal 3 damage to that opponent.

cards.flavor: "The hammer of heretics, the light of Spain, the savior of his country, the honor of his order." – Sebastián de Olmedo
cards.raw_source_text: Oprimir: When an opponent reveals a deity, tome, or mystic support card, they may chose to discard it and set their initiative for that round to 0. If they do not, deal 3 damage to that opponent.

cards.name: Xerxes

abilities.name: Gabk
abilities.text: Opponents cannot attack with weapons more than once each round.

cards.flavor: Xerxes' war against Athens, while it contained contable defeats, was a war of punishment, not conquest, and is considered a success in those terms.
cards.raw_source_text: Gabk: Opponents cannot attack with weapons more than once each round.

cards.name: Kamikaze

abilities.name: Boujakubujin
abilities.text: After an opposing warrior moves outside of their turn, you may immediately make an attack against them at +1.

abilities.name: Shinsei
abilities.text: You may use an other Inspiration.

cards.flavor: Kublai Khan prepared to invade Japan twice, in 1274 and 1281.  Both times, typhoons scattered his fleets. These storms earned the name Kamikaze, "Divine Wind", among the Japanese.
cards.raw_source_text:
Boujakubujin: After an opposing warrior moves outside of their turn, you may immediately make an attack against them at +1. 
Shinsei: You may use an other Inspiration.

cards.name: Kremlin

abilities.name: Velichiye
abilities.text: After you roll more than two dice at the same time and after you reveal this card, put a counter on this card. When you make a roll, you may remove 2 counters from this card to roll one additional die and choose one die to exclude from the roll.

abilities.name: Stelitse
abilities.text: You may use another special card in this game.

cards.flavor: Ivan III of Russia organized the reconstructions of the Moscow Kremlin, forwhich he used several noted Italian builders and architects.
cards.raw_source_text:
Velichiye: After you roll more than two dice at the same time and after you reveal this card, put a counter on this card. When you make a roll, you may remove 2 counters from this card to roll one additional die and choose one die to exclude from the roll.
Stelitse: You may use another special card in this game.

cards.name: Confucius

abilities.name: Shì sù
abilities.text: This card is considered to be all elements. You may use another inspiration card.

abilities.name: Mìng zhì
abilities.text: While this card is in play, all warriors have 0 experience.

cards.flavor: After leaving the court of the King of Lu, Confucius spent many years traveling throughout China attempting to encourage morality and sincerity among the rulers of the Northern Kingdoms.
cards.raw_source_text:
Shì sù: This card is considered to be all elements. You may use another inspiration card.
Mìng zhì: While this card is in play, all warriors have 0 experience.

cards.name: Lao Tzu

abilities.name: Shì sù
abilities.text: This card is considered to be all elements. You may use another inspiration card.

abilities.name: Wù xiàn qi
abilities.text: While this card is in play, every warrior has 0 initiative.

cards.flavor: A border guard asked him to write his teachings down before leaving Hangu for the Great Desert. Therefore, Lao Tzu wrote the Tao Te Ching and then left riding his buffalo.
cards.raw_source_text:
Shì sù: This card is considered to be all elements. You may use another inspiration card.
Wù xiàn qi: While this card is in play, every warrior has 0 initiative.

cards.name: Unicornio Cuerno

abilities.name: Legendario Rescate
abilities.text: At the beginning of each round, you may roll two dice. If the roll is greater than your life, you may move one space or use an "action" ability.

cards.flavor: The Emperor of the Holy Roman Empire Charles V settled a huge debt he had with the Bayreuth Marquis by giving him two of these horns, which were worth a fortune. After centuries, the "horns of the unicorn" were found to be just narwhal fangs.
cards.raw_source_text: Legendario Rescate: At the beginning of each round, you may roll two dice. If the roll is greater than your life, you may move one space or use an "action" ability.

cards.name: Queen Anne's Revenge

abilities.name: Pillage
abilities.text: You may use abilities on any support card in the arena.

abilities.name: Choice of Battles ~ Action
abilities.text: Discard this card. Move you warrior to any unoccupied space in the arena. Your next defense roll gains +4.

cards.flavor: After losing The Adventure in an attempt to free her from the sands of the coast off North Carolina, Blackbeard abandoned the Queen Anne's Revenge and disbanded his flotilla.
cards.raw_source_text:
Pillage: You may use abilities on any support card in the arena.
Choice of Battles ~ Action: Discard this card. Move you warrior to any unoccupied space in the arena. Your next defense roll gains +4.

cards.name: Isla Tortuga

abilities.name: Alcabaza
abilities.text: Your cards cannot be discarded by opposing card abilities.

abilities.name: Venganza
abilities.text: After you are damaged by a critical hit, your attacks deal +1 damage.

cards.flavor: Located off the northwest coast of Haiti, Ile de la Tortue was widely used by many pirates as a base of operations until 1684 when piracy was outlawed in the Caribbean.
cards.raw_source_text:
Alcabaza: Your cards cannot be discarded by opposing card abilities.
Venganza: After you are damaged by a critical hit, your attacks deal +1 damage.

cards.name: Kilij

abilities.name: Bolmek
abilities.text: If the defender has a face-up armor or shield card, attacks with this weapon deal -1 damage.

cards.flavor: Kilij's broad tip is called "yelman"; it makes the sword very sharp-edged, something you can see today in British and American cerimonial swords.
cards.raw_source_text: Bolmek: If the defender has a face-up armor or shield card, attacks with this weapon deal -1 damage.

cards.name: Istanbul

abilities.name: Tartisma
abilities.text: You may discard a location. If you don't, choose an opponent. That opponent's rolls get -1 for this round.

abilities.name: Yeni san
abilities.text: Your attacks made at "+0" are made at +2 instead.

cards.flavor: "If someone were to look once at the world, he should look at Istanbul." - Alphonse de Lamartine
cards.raw_source_text:
Tartisma - Reveal: You may discard a location. If you don't, choose an opponent. That opponent's rolls get -1 for this round.
Yeni san: Your attacks made at "+0" are made at +2 instead.

cards.name: Ordin de Balaur

abilities.name: Justus et Paciens
abilities.text: After you hit an opponent, your next attack or defense roll gains +1. Once per round, if your opponent's experience has been modified by a card abilty, gain +3 instead.

cards.flavor: Created by a Serbian knight in order to cause the death of the Ottoman Sultan Murad I, the Order was brought back to life after many years to defend the Cross from enemies. Vlad II was invited in the Order in 1431, and therefore gained the title of "Dracul".
cards.raw_source_text: Justus et Paciens: After you hit an opponent, your next attack or defense roll gains +1. Once per round, if your opponent's experience has been modified by a card abilty, gain +3 instead.

cards.name: Vlad II Dracul

abilities.name: Nemilos
abilities.text: After a warrior gains life, your next attack deals +1 damage. After you gain life, your next attack roll gets -1.

cards.flavor:
Vlad II killed relatives and friends to secure power.
Vladd II and his eldest son Mircea were killed in 1447, leaving Vlad III to claim the Valacchia seat from his own cousin.
cards.raw_source_text: Nemilos: After a warrior gains life, your next attack deals +1 damage. After you gain life, your next attack roll gets -1.

cards.name: Yggdrassil

abilities.name: Asgard
abilities.text: All your attacks deal +1 damage.

abilities.name: Hvergelmir
abilities.text: All other warriors gain +1 speed.

cards.flavor: The World Tree holds together the nine worlds of Norse cosmology, including Asgard,Midgard, and Hel. The eagle Vidofnir, the dragon Nidhoggr, squirrel Ratatosk, and the great stags Duneyrr, Durathror, Dvalin and Dainn all live in or feed upon the World Tree.
cards.raw_source_text:
Asgard: All your attacks deal +1 damage.
Hvergelmir: All other warriors gain +1 speed.
